The key sentence is: "others been bitten by the travel bug and can't wait to explore the world." The phrase "can't wait to explore" suggests eagerness. So, "bitten by the travel bug" must mean having a strong desire to travel. Looking at the options: (C) is "eager to see the world," which aligns with that. The other options don't fit.
